title: Policy Shortcomings Puts SAF Production at Risk
content:
The International Air Transport Association (IATA) announced that it expects Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production to reach 2 million tonnes (Mt) (2.5 billion liters) or 0.7% of airlinesâ€™ total fuel consumption in 2025. 
â€œWhile it is encouraging that SAF production is expected to double to 2 million tonnes in 2025, that is just 0.7% of aviationâ€™s total fuel needs. And even that relatively small amount will add $4.4 billion globally to the fuel bill. The pace of progress in ramping up production and gaining efficiencies to reduce costs must accelerate,â€ said Willie Walsh, IATAâ€™s Director General.
author: Analysts Account
